calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-12-2006 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-22-2006 Continued To Sep-12-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Jonathan Ferdon appearing for petitioner. Christopher Jew appearing for objector Sherman Chang. Kelly Dixon appearing for temporary conservator Tom Lucas. This petition needs to be continued until the distribution of the conservatorship is resolved. Ms. Dixon informs the court that she does not know who or what method to distribute the conservatorship assets. It is about $97,000.00. There may be other assets. Mr. Chang has a will. He will have to open probate or file a declaration stating that the conservatorship assets are about $90,000.00 and he can file a 13100 declaration. Mr. Ferdon wants to make sure that his office will be paid for the service in this case if probate is not necessary. The hearing in the conservatorship accounting is set on 8/29. This matter will be continued to 9/12. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
